evidence: profile indicates overhead from separate launch of W @ X, B.T @ X, A @ (B.T @ X), and addition
rank-16 update (A @ (B.T @ X)) is small and could benefit from fusion
recommended_actions: keep cuBLAS for the large W @ X GEMM (most costly)
fuse the rank-16 update into a single kernel (load B.T from shared memory or vectorized loads, compute BC, load A, compute A @ BC, add to Y)
test scalar and vectorized (float4) rank-16 kernels to reduce launch and memory traffic
